description: This file defines the MainActivity for an Android application demonstrating biometric authentication, login/logout flow, and interaction with ViewModel. It handles UI interactions, observes authentication states, and manages biometric prompts to unlock a session.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Main screen activity handling authentication, biometric prompts, and navigation onto the main app features.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes views, sets up observers and click handlers, and configures the activity state on creation.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Handles activity resumption logic, including optional lock behavior and biometric prompt triggering.

methods.name: onDestroy
methods.description: Cancels ongoing coroutine jobs and performs cleanup.

methods.name: wireClicks
methods.description: Sets click listeners for UI buttons.

methods.name: observeAuthState
methods.description: Collects and reacts to changes in authentication state to update UI or navigate.

methods.name: observeStatusLog
methods.description: Collects log lines and updates the log UI component.

methods.name: setButtonsEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables buttons based on current authentication state.

methods.name: maybePromptUnlock
methods.description: Triggers biometric authentication prompt if conditions are met.
